contract_summary: Duplicates a task context from old to new, acquiring a reference on each of the three label pointers (nnp, previous, onexec) via aa_get_label. The caller receives a new context with elevated reference counts for those labels. The caller must later call aa_put_label on each field to release the references when the context is no longer needed. This is a 'get' operation for multiple labels at once, ensuring proper reference-counting during context duplication.
